title: Run Cloudflare D1 migrations
description: Runs `wrangler d1 migrations <command>` for a Worker's D1 database.

command.description: The D1 migrations subcommand. Supplied by the target's configuration.

databases.description: Map of D1 binding name to database_name. Baked in by inference.

db.description: Which D1 binding to target. Required when the Worker has multiple D1 databases.

remote.description: Apply/list against the remote database (`--remote`) instead of local (`--local`).
